text: The clean geometry of glass and the intentional order of this modern hallway make me feel like I’m wandering through the architecture of thought itself. Then, stepping into the next space, a wave of curiosity and self-awareness washes over me. Here, the bold colors and textual reflections on the wall invite me to consider my own presence and role as both observer and participant. I find myself wondering about the boundaries between what is shown, what is hidden, and what it really means to exist in a world constantly negotiating between clarity and uncertainty. I feel quietly alert, inquisitive, and just a bit exposed.
